---
title: "Theory Extraction"
author:
  - name: "Joe Warne¹"
  - name: "Barrry Gorman¹"
format: docx
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: false
# bibliography: references.bib
# csl: 
editor: visual
---

#### Affiliation

¹ School of Biological, Health and Sports Sciences, Technological University Dublin, Tallaght, Dublin, Ireland

#### ORCIDs

Joe Warne – 0000-0002-4359-8132

#### Correspondence

\pagebreak

```{r}
# Load packages
library(dplyr)
```

# Introduction

# Methods

# Results

# Discussion

# References
